originalTitle: IBM just cut its outlook, but not by as much as investors feared
summary: IBM’s official earnings report comes after a bruising profit warning last week.
content: IBM’s official earnings report comes after a bruising profit warning last week.
chineseTitle: IBM 刚刚下调了展望，但幅度没有投资者担心的那么大
chineseSummary: IBM 在上周发布了惨痛的盈利预警后发布了官方盈利报告。
chineseContent: IBM 在上周发布了惨痛的盈利预警后发布了官方盈利报告。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
